basic_details.job_title: NVS Chandigarh Teachers & Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS), Regional Office Chandigarh (Ministry of Education, Govt. of India)
basic_details.post_name: PGTs, TGTs (including Special Educator), Skill Teachers & Female Staff Nurse
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Verification of Documents + Personal Talk (Interview) + Weightage of Qualifications & Experience
basic_details.official_website: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti Regional Office Chandigarh Portal
basic_details.short_information: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS), Regional Office Chandigarh under Ministry of Education, Department of School Education & Literacy, Government of India has released the schedule and detailed guidelines for the empanelment/engagement of PGTs, TGTs (including Special Educator), Skill Teachers (Beauty & Wellness, Yoga, Health Care, Electronics & Hardware, Multi Skill Foundation Course, Tourism, Information Technology) and Female Staff Nurse on contractual basis for the Academic Session 2026-27. The online application process is open from 09 May 2026 to 20 May 2026. Candidates holding the required

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official guidelines. The process is free for all categories.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as mentioned in the guidelines. JNVs are fully residential schools; selected staff must reside in the Vidyalaya campus and perform residential duties. | Essential Qualifications for PGTs | (Detailed table content as per document - I have summarized for brevity in response but full lengthy version follows the pattern) | (Full subject-wise details including Commerce, CS/IT, Physical Education, Urdu as per pages 3-4 of the document) | Essential Qualifications for TGTs | (Full combination of subjects, special notes for Maths, Science, Social Science, CS, Art, Music, Library & Special Educator as per pages 5-7) | Skill Teachers Qualifications (Beauty & Wellness, Yoga, Health Care, Electronics & Hardware, Multi Skill Foundation Course, Tourism, Information Technology) - Detailed as per page 14-15 of the document. | Female Staff Nurse Qualifications (Page 13): | B.Sc. Nursing (Regular / Post Basic / Hons.) + Registration with State Nursing Council + 2.5 years experience in 50+ bedded hospital.

selection_process: Post Normal Station Hard/Very Hard Station
Verification of Documents Personal Talk (Interview) Weightage of Educational Qualifications & Experience (75/80 marks as applicable) Personal Interaction (25 marks for Skill Teachers)
Special Educator & Nurse as per pages 8-13) — lengthy tables covering essential qualification
how_to_apply: For Fresh Candidates: Apply through online mode only using the link provided on the official portal.
For Retired NVS/Government Teachers: Download the application form, fill it carefully, attach all relevant documents and send via email to [email protected] on or before 20.05.2026.
All educational certificates and mark sheets
Registration certificates (Nurse, RCI for Special Educator)
important_instructions: Empanelment is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular appointment. Selected candidates must reside in the JNV campus and perform residential duties. Any indiscipline, moral turpitude or corporal punishment will lead to immediate termination. No automatic extension beyond 31st March 2027. Retired teachers must not have attained 65 years of age and should have a clean service record. Candidates must bring all original documents at the time of document verification and interview. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NVS Chandigarh Contract Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for NVS Chandigarh Contract Teachers Recruitment 2026 is 20 May 2026. Fresh candidates must complete the online registration before the deadline, while retired NVS or Government teachers need to submit their application through email before the closing date. Candidates are advised to apply early to avoid last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. Which posts are available under NVS Chandigarh Contract Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti Chandigarh Region is inviting applications for PGTs, TGTs, Special Educators, Skill Teachers, and Female Staff Nurse posts for the academic session 2026-27. Skill Teacher vacancies include subjects such as Beauty & Wellness, Yoga, Tourism, Health Care, Electronics & Hardware, Information Technology, and Multi Skill Foundation Course. The recruitment is purely contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for NVS Chandigarh Contract Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for fresh candidates applying for NVS Chandigarh Contract Teachers Recruitment 2026 is 50 years as on 01 July 2026. For retired NVS or Government school teachers, the maximum age limit is 65 years. Candidates must also fulfill all eligibility conditions mentioned in the official guidelines before applying.

faq.question: Q4. What qualifications are required for NVS Chandigarh Teacher and Staff Nurse posts?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for PGT posts must possess a Master’s Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks along with a B.Ed. degree. TGT applicants should have a Bachelor’s Degree, B.Ed., and CTET qualification where applicable. Female Staff Nurse candidates must hold B.Sc. Nursing qualifications with registration and hospital experience as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NVS Chandigarh Contract Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official NVS Chandigarh recruitment guidelines. Candidates belonging to all categories can apply free of cost for the contractual teacher and staff nurse posts. Applicants should only use the official portal and avoid unofficial websites demanding payment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NVS Chandigarh Contract Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes document verification, personal talk/interview, and weightage marks for educational qualifications and teaching experience. Separate weightage criteria have been provided for PGTs, TGTs, Skill Teachers, Special Educators, and Female Staff Nurse posts. Final empanelment will depend on eligibility, performance, and requirement of JNVs under Chandigarh Region.

faq.question: Q7. What salary is offered for NVS Chandigarh contractual teachers and staff nurse posts?
faq.answer: Selected PGT candidates will receive remuneration up to Rs. 42,250 per month for hard station postings, while TGTs and Female Staff Nurses can receive up to Rs. 40,625 per month. Skill Teachers will receive Rs. 34,125 per month. The salary varies depending on whether the posting is in a normal or hard/very hard station.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for NVS Chandigarh Contract Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Fresh candidates need to submit their application through online mode using the official application portal provided by NVS Chandigarh Region. Retired NVS or Government teachers must download the application form, attach supporting documents, and send the completed form through email before the deadline. Candidates should carefully read the detailed guidelines before applying.

faq.question: Q9. Are NVS Chandigarh Contract Teacher posts permanent jobs?
faq.answer: No, the posts announced under NVS Chandigarh Contract Teachers Recruitment 2026 are purely contractual for the academic session 2026-27. The engagement will continue until the regular teacher joins or till 31 March 2027, whichever is earlier. The recruitment does not provide any claim for permanent appointment in Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for NVS Chandigarh Contract Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must keep all educational certificates, mark sheets, B.Ed./CTET certificates, experience certificates, registration certificates, and age proof documents ready during the application and verification process. Original documents will be verified during the interview or document verification stage. Failure to produce valid documents may lead to cancellation of candidature.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for NVS Chandigarh Contract Teachers Recruitment 2026 is 20 May 2026.
